text: I feel a quiet unease as I tread through these dimly lit, almost sterile corridors. The cold, reflective surfaces and the blue glow from the second image suggest a space concerned with knowledge and innovation—perhaps an office or research center after hours. The silence and emptiness amplify my awareness of each step, and I feel like a thoughtful observer lost in contemplation, questioning the purpose of these spaces when they are devoid of human presence.
